data.title: Official Trump meme coin leads $906 million token unlocks this week
data.description:
The crypto market is set for token unlocks totaling $906 million between April 14 and April 21, 2025. Sixteen various projects will have “cliff unlocks” in this timeframe, according to Tokenomist data. The unlocks’ values vary from $5. 61 million to $334 million. The Trump meme coin (TRUMP) is at the forefront with $334 million of […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-meme-coin-leads-token-unlocks/

data.title: Trump’s WLFI Expands Holdings With $775K SEI Token Investment
data.description:
TL;DR World Liberty Financial (WLFI), the crypto initiative backed by the Trump family, has invested $775,000 in SEI tokens, further expanding its growing altcoin portfolio. Despite current losses across its crypto holdings, WLFI remains focused on diversification. This move comes amid a shifting political and financial climate that is becoming increasingly supportive of digital assets.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/trumps-wlfi-expands-holdings-with-775k-sei-token-investment/

data.title: Vitalik: Privacy is the core of maintaining social order and promoting technological progress
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Vitalik Buterin emphasized in his latest blog post that privacy is a core element in maintaining social order and promoting technological progress. He pointed out that artificial intelligence is greatly improving the ability of centralized data collection and analysis, while also expanding the scope of voluntary data sharing. The risk of information leakage is increasing, and cryptographic technologies such as ZK-SNARK and FHE provide possibilities for "selective disclosure" and "verifiable privacy protection." Privacy is not about being separated from society, but about allowing everyone to live freely and explore innovation without being overly monitored and judged. He called on the Web3 community to actively promote the popularization and standardization of privacy tools to cope with the increasingly centralized information control trend.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase launches pound-denominated blockchain deposit account to support pound on-chain payments
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News JPMorgan Chase's blockchain division Kinexys (formerly Onyx) has launched a blockchain deposit account denominated in pound sterling in the UK, marking an important expansion of its real-time settlement infrastructure following the early launch of euro and dollar products. Currently, JPMorgan Chase has allowed companies to make round-the-clock on-chain payments in British pounds (GBP), adding to its euro (EUR) and US dollar (USD) options. It is reported that large companies such as SwapAgent and Trafigura of the London Stock Exchange have taken the lead in using JPMorgan Chase's newly launched pound blockchain account. (The Block)

data.title: Binance Finance, One-Click Coin Purchase, Flash Exchange, Leverage, and Contracts will be launched on KernelDAO (KERNEL)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Financial Management, One-Click Coin Buying, Flash Exchange, Leverage, and Contracts will be launched on KernelDAO (KERNEL), and the KERNEL principal-guaranteed coin-earning current product will be launched on the Binance principal-guaranteed coin-earning platform and open for subscription at 20:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on April 14, 2025. Coin safe warehouses and position-by-position leverage will add KERNEL borrowable assets at 20:20 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on April 14, 2025, as well as KERNEL/USDT, KERNEL/USDC full-position and position-by-position leverage trading pairs.

data.title: A 20x short ETH address added 1,013 ETH to raise the entry price, and the position value rose to $15 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market monitoring, an address that opened a 20x ETH short position on Hyperliquid has just added another 1013.1 ETH (about 1.684 million US dollars) to its short position, and the position value has risen to 15 million US dollars. The entry price has risen to 1641 US dollars, and the current floating loss is 294,000 US dollars.

data.title: Animoca Brands reveals plans to partner with “big gaming companies” to develop GameFi market
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Animoca Brands CEO Ouyang Qijun revealed that the popularity of the company's blockchain sandbox game The Sandbox has declined, and plans to cooperate with major game companies to develop the GameFi market in the future, but no specific details have been disclosed at this stage. In addition, Ouyang Qijun said that stablecoins and blockchain infrastructure can further promote Hong Kong's status as an international financial center, allowing institutional Web3, including tokenized assets, to develop rapidly, but in comparison, Hong Kong's progress in native Web3 is slower, and in the future it is necessary to find a balance between the two to promote the development of the ecosystem. (East Net)

data.title: Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launched projects NO and RDC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launched projects NO, RDC, users can start trading by entering the Onchain Trading section on the App interface.

data.title: dYdX Treasury SubDAO Charter Approved with Board Changes
data.description: According to PANews, the dYdX Foundation announced the approval of proposal #238, which received community support for the formal ratification of the dYdX Treasury SubDAO charter and the replacement of a Class B director. The voting process involved 39 validators and 504 accounts, achieving a participation rate of 56.08%. The proposal saw overwhelming support, with 91.62% in favor, 8.38% abstaining, and no votes against.

data.title: Trump-Backed WLFI Buys $775K in SEI
data.description:
They scooped up $775,000 worth of SEI tokens on April 12. That’s 4. 89 million SEI added to the altcoin-heavy portfolio from WLFI, according to Arkham Intelligence. WLFI’s Altcoin Bets Still Underwater Despite $347M Spent The purchase was made through a trading wallet linked to WLFI, funded by a USDC transfer from the project’s main wallet
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/trump-backed-wlfi-buys-775k-in-sei/
